surprise_log.observation: A household-grandparent acute ascending cholangitis presentation surfaced on the household-side back-porch covered-veranda wicker-loveseat Saturday late-afternoon: the household-grandparent with a documented gallstone-cholelithiasis history-and-prior-cholecystectomy carry-forward on the household-side family-medical-record ledger plus a residual common-bile-duct CBD distal-stricture pattern noted on the household-grandparent's prior hepatobiliary outpatient surveillance pull plus a documented prior endoscopic-retrograde-cholangiopancreatography ERCP surveillance imaging cycle showing CBD distal-narrowing surfaced the Charcot's-triad clinical-cluster of right-upper-quadrant RUQ tearing-and-cramping abdominal pain plus high-grade fever-and-shaking-chills rigors plus jaundice-and-scleral-icterus picture pulling onto the bedside acute ascending cholangitis biliary obstruction exam pattern with the bedside RUQ tenderness-and-guarding survey plus the bedside Murphy's-sign provocation pull moving onto the full Reynolds-pentad picture with the household-grandparent's added hypotension-and-altered-mental-status clinical-features pulling the household-grandparent into the severe-ascending-cholangitis-with-septic-shock band. The household-adult thumbed the nine-one-one quick-dial on the household-side back-porch wall-mounted weather-resistant phone keypad within roughly two minutes of the symptom-cluster recognition pull and the township paramedic-and-EMS response-unit was rolled up to the household-side residence inside a six-minute roll-out window with a pre-arrival regional Beaufort-Memorial Medical-Center emergency-department-and-gastroenterology consult activation phone-line bridge call walking the household-side through the at-home semi-recumbent positioning posture plus the household-adult-side continuous-phone-line symptom-update channel running into the paramedic-unit arrival on the household-side biliary-obstruction-with-septic-shock holding-pattern band. The paramedic-and-EMS on-scene workup bundle ran through the focused biliary-and-septic-shock triage assessment pinning the acute ascending cholangitis biliary obstruction with Reynolds-pentad presentation plus bilateral large-bore peripheral IV-access placement plus the upfront point-of-care lactic-acid pull on the per-protocol sepsis-six bundle plus the upfront per-protocol blood-culture-and-broad-spectrum-antibiotic-loading pass on bolus piperacillin-tazobactam empiric coverage plus the per-protocol crystalloid-fluid-resuscitation loading-pass on lactated-Ringer's thirty-milliliter-per-kilogram bolus targeting mean-arterial-pressure MAP-above-sixty-five hemodynamic-target plus the per-protocol pre-arrival regional Beaufort-Memorial Medical-Center emergency-department continuous-radio-channel handoff cadence with the on-call gastroenterology attending Dr. Saskia Lindqvist and the on-call hepatobiliary-and-interventional-endoscopy attending Dr. Cyprian Holloway looped onto the pre-arrival warm-handoff conference channel. The regional Beaufort-Memorial Medical-Center ED-emergent-intake medical-workup sequence on the household-grandparent arrival cycle pulled through the rapid contrast-enhanced computed-tomography CT-abdomen-and-pelvis imaging confirming the dilated-intrahepatic-and-extrahepatic-biliary-tree-with-CBD-obstruction biliary-tree-distention imaging signature plus the bedside right-upper-quadrant ultrasound-RUQ-US pull confirming the dilated-CBD-with-pneumobilia-and-pericholecystic-fluid biliary-obstruction-with-cholangitis pattern plus the initial complete-blood-count CBC confirming leukocytosis-with-left-shift plus the initial comprehensive-metabolic-panel CMP confirming elevated-direct-bilirubin-and-elevated-alkaline-phosphatase-and-elevated-gamma-glutamyl-transferase obstructive-cholestasis biochemical signature plus the initial coagulation-panel-and-INR confirming mild-coagulopathy on the cholestasis-induced vitamin-K-deficiency pull plus the bedside arterial-blood-gas-and-lactic-acid pull confirming lactic-acidosis on a serum-lactic-acid-above-four-millimoles-per-liter pull on the per-protocol septic-shock criteria band. The emergent endoscopic-retrograde-cholangiopancreatography ERCP biliary-decompression activation cycle pulled the door-to-ERCP-table sixty-minute window target with the household-grandparent routed out of the ED-emergent-intake bay through to the regional Beaufort-Memorial Medical-Center endoscopy-suite-table inside a forty-nine-minute door-to-scope-insertion window under combined moderate-sedation-and-anesthesia-monitoring induction plus the per-protocol side-viewing-duodenoscope-insertion approach plus the per-protocol selective-CBD-cannulation-and-cholangiogram-imaging pass confirming the distal-CBD-stricture-with-obstructing-stone biliary-obstruction picture plus the per-protocol sphincterotomy-and-stone-extraction pass with balloon-and-basket retrieval cycle plus the per-protocol CBD-plastic-stent-or-self-expanding-metal-stent placement decision pass on the per-protocol post-extraction biliary-drainage cycle. The post-ERCP medical-intensive-care-unit MICU admission cycle is set on a post-procedure invasive-hemodynamic-monitoring band on the radial-arterial-line catheter plus the per-protocol continued-broad-spectrum-antibiotic course-cycle on piperacillin-tazobactam plus the per-protocol septic-shock vasopressor-titration cycle on norepinephrine-and-vasopressin titration as needed plus the per-protocol multimodal-analgesia regimen on fentanyl-plus-acetaminophen rotation plus the per-protocol surveillance hepatic-and-renal-and-coagulation panel rotation pulling through a trailing-twenty-four-hour post-ERCP observation window plus the household-adult-and-broader-household post-ERCP shared-decision care-coordination conversation across a projected three-to-five-day MICU course rolling onto a regional Beaufort-Memorial Medical-Center hepatobiliary step-down ward transfer onto the inpatient hepatobiliary-rehabilitation-and-discharge-planning referral pathway plus the long-term hepatobiliary-surveillance imaging schedule on the post-discharge follow-up CT-and-MRCP magnetic-resonance-cholangiopancreatography protocol.
